name: Girl Scout Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the milk and vanilla until light and fluffy.
4. Combine the flour and baking powder; gradually add to the mixture and mix well.
5. Chill for at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
7. Cut with a trefoil cookie cutter or your choice of cutter.
8. Place cookies on ungreased baking pans.
9. Sprinkle with sugar if desired.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes until lightly browned.
11. Cool on wire racks.
